remarks: Newly constructed 1-bedroom, 1-bath apartment at Heights Crossing, a luxury apartment community in the Noroton Heights neighborhood of Darien. Conveniently located across from the Metro-North train station, offering direct access to New York City and close proximity to everyday conveniences.  This residence features an open-concept floor plan with luxury vinyl plank flooring throughout and a Juliet balcony off the living room. The kitchen includes Quartz countertops, a center island with seating, custom cabinetry, GE appliances, designer tile backsplash, and pantry. The primary bedroom offers dual closets and an en-suite bath with a glass-enclosed stall shower. Additional features include a foyer, side-by-side in-unit washer and dryer, and central air.  Community amenities include secure entry, elevator, first come, first-serve garage parking, on-site management, fitness and wellness center, golf simulator, resident lounge with fireplace, co-working spaces, reservable event room, bicycle storage, trash chutes, landscaped courtyard with fountain, and a dedicated mail and package room. Community charge of $70/month includes 1 GB high-speed internet, water, sewer, and trash service.
